title: Koi
description: Koi is a stark black-and-white CPvP pack built on pure duality — ghost-white diamond, void-black netherite, and a silent cosmic sky. ☯️
body:
# ☯️ Koi — texture pack ☯️
**✨ Short Description**
Koi is a stark, monochrome CPvP texture pack built on pure duality — ghost-white diamond against void-black netherite, set beneath a dark starfield sky pierced by light. Clean, silent, and balanced like a yin-yang at the end of the world 🌑🤍⚔️.

---

## 💎 What to Expect
- ☯️ Pure black and white duality palette — crisp white diamond vs deep shadow netherite.
- 🌑 Dark cosmic sky with soft light beams and scattered stars for a meditative atmosphere.
- ⚡ Low-resolution performance-first textures — stable FPS even on low-end machines.
- 🎯 Maximum armor and item contrast for clean, readable competitive fights.

---

## 🔑 Key Features
- 📦 Optimized 16×16 textures built for CPvP.
- 🎯 Clean item designs — swords, bows, axes, potions.
- 💨 Reduced particle clutter — focused visuals without noise.
- 🧩 Compatible with most PvP clients (Badlion, Lunar, etc.).

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → "Open Pack Folder".
3. 📂 Drop the downloaded zip inside (no need to unzip).
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.11**
- ✅ Compatible with most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Badlion, Lunar, etc.); adjust pack priority if needed.
